title: Hermes Agent 5.0 (New Upgrades): HERMES BECAME ULTRA-HERMES!
summary: Hermes Agent 0.16 (Surface release) introduces a native desktop app for macOS, Linux, and Windows, remote gateway support, an upgraded web dashboard with admin controls, improved model search with fuzzy matching, and enhanced security. The release aims to make the agent framework more accessible across multiple surfaces and deployment scenarios.
